entry.title: Pining for Tim Drake
entry.summary:
Author: ElentiyaG

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,850Chapters: 57/57Kudos: 1,113

Summary: Dick Grayson was completely blindsided. Since when was Tim Drake, his Baby Bird, an adult? Since when was Baby Bird an attractive adult? Isn’t he still like 12 years old and knocking on his door in Bludhaven?   I have been editing earlier chapters in between new updates!

entry.title: Birthday Gift
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,497Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 110

Summary: Damian's eighteenth birthday is a pretty quiet affair. Just family, a couple of his friends from school, a couple of his super friends. Dick drives up from Bludhaven with a gift. All through dinner, through cake and gifts, all eyes are on Damian. His family's more than others. Bruce watches him with a hooded gaze. Jason like a cat watching a mouse. Tim hovers close, hungry. But Damian gravitates toward Dick. Lets Dick ruffle his hair and pull him against his side and kiss his cheek. None of the other guests think anything of it. Dick's always been open with his affection. Damian tolerates it. So when the party is over and the guests leave, it's Dick he lets trail after him to his bedroom._____Damian is eighteen. Dick has been waiting a long time.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Pet Diary
entry.summary:
Author: CallmeSSS

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,211Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Gotham has a crime rate that rivals its population count, police sirens are familiar background noise, and people learn not to ask too many questions.Dick Grayson and Tim Drake don't ask too many questions either.About the gray rabbit who sulks over bread.About the black cat who looks at them like he's plotting something.About why things in the apartment sometimes move on their own.They just think they're keeping pets.They're not entirely wrong.

entry.title: For the second time
entry.summary:
Author: Zaeriiii

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,389Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 64

Summary: "I love you," Damian corrects. "Present tense. Not past. That hasn't changed, Tim. You might not remember me, but I remember you. Every part of you."It’s too much. Too intense, too honest."I don't know how to return that," Tim admits."I’m not asking you to. I’m only asking you to let me... be here. Let me show you who I am now. And then you decide.""Decide what?""If you can love me again."

entry.title: The Robins: Robin's End
entry.summary:
Author: SpiderFan_33

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,245Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 5

Summary: Two months after Jason Todd shot Bruce Wayne dead in the bowels of the Batcave, the city is trying to find its balance again—but the Bat-Family is more fractured than ever. With Barbara Gordon leaving Gotham to build something new and Jason carving a brutal path through the city’s criminal underworld, the responsibility for holding the line falls to an uneasy partnership: Damian Wayne as Batman… and Tim Drake-Wayne as Robin. On the surface, they are still perfect together in the field—precise, ruthless, unstoppable. Off the rooftops, nothing is that simple. Grief and regret twists loyalty into something harder to recognize. And the secrets they’ve buried—about Bruce, about each other, about the lines they crossed trying to save what was already lost—are beginning to surface. As the city edges toward a new order and the past refuses to stay buried, Batman and Robin must decide what justice means in a world where the man who taught them is gone—and where the greatest threat to the Bat-Family might be the truth. The Robins: Robin’s End is the final chapter of The Robins saga—a story of grief, loyalty, love, betrayal, and the impossible legacy of the symbol called Robin.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Mission: Get Dick Pregnant
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,151Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 82

Summary: Dick gets shot during a mission and a doctors tells Bruce he's had a miscarriage. This is 2 months after the sex pollen thing but Dick didn't know about it.Bruce is feeling guilty for everything that's happened, and when Dick feels better and goes back home, they all have A Very Important Talk.Turns out, after a lot of thinking, Dick wants to try to get pregnant... this time intentionally. And he wants Bruce to reverse his vasectomy!How will this affect their lives? How will their friends and other heroes act when it's known a few intimate details about their whole relationship?
